title: 有馬記念の後に・祭だ祭だわあっしょい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One wins the Arima Kinen. Now, she's
reached the top of both regional and central
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she stands at the heart of the massive festival
she's created, Inari One declares that all
Umamusume and races, whether they're regionals
or centrals, are equally the greatest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Inari One is named Umamusume
of the Year. The people of Oi throw her a
celebratory festival, marking a boisterous start to
the days to come.
